description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 1 day ago - May 15, 2026 | 🧑‍💻 Web3 / Trading Infrastructure

A highly technical crypto-native company is hiring a Staff Backend Engineer to own the critical runtime powering autonomous trading agents operating with real capital.

What you'll own: 
- Execution infrastructure and trading reliability 
- State management and data pipelines 
- Scalable agent architecture and risk systems

Strong fit for engineers coming from: 
- Trading infrastructure or exchange environments 
- Low-latency or high-reliability backend systems 
- Crypto-native engineering where correctness matters more than speed

The company is looking for: 
- Staff-level ownership — problem definition through production, no hand-holding 
- Deep fluency in crypto trading systems, exchange APIs, and transaction lifecycles 
- Strong TypeScript / Node.js; Golang a plus 
- Event-driven architectures and state machines — must be second nature 
- AI as a daily development accelerant — non-negotiable 
- Production operations experience: monitoring, on-call, incident response

Stack: TypeScript / Node.js · Golang · distributed systems · event-driven architectures · state machines

📩 To apply: DM Marta Tavanez on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/marta-tavanez-2b0a1524 (Relevant profiles and referrals welcome).

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/marta-tavanez-2b0a1524_remote-staff-backend-engineer-web3-share-7461052091508080640-KRTQ
